title: Sea Team 3 Pcs 8cm/3.15 Inch Silver Mirror Disco Balls Christmas Tree Bauble Hanging Ball - Perfect for Christmas Decor, Tree Ornament, Disco Party Decoration.
features: Festive Decoration: Add some festivity to your home with the Sea Team disk mirror balls, perfect for Christmas decoration and Christmas tree ornaments.
Easy to Hang: With a convenient lanyard provided, these Christmas balls can easily be hung up wherever you want, creating a shiny, sparkling display.
Versatile Usage: Not just for Christmas, the disco mirror balls can be used for music festivals, birthday celebrations, and parties of all kinds, bringing that 70s vibe to any occasion.
High-Quality Material: Made with high-quality foam and glass materials, these lightweight mirror balls are reflective and durable, providing long-lasting use for all your decorating needs.
Perfect Package: Each package includes 3 disco mirror balls, 8cm/3.15" in size, making them the perfect set for large-scale decorating projects.
description: Product description Sea Team 3 Pcs 8cm/3.15 Inch Silver Mirror Disco Balls Christmas Tree Bauble Hanging Ball - Perfect for Christmas Decor, Tree Ornament, Disco Party Decoration. Safety Warning Choking hazard - small parts. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
